term: Get the Monkey Off One’s Back
englishDefinitions: To get rid of a burden, problem, addiction, or source of pressure.
To finally remove something that has been troubling or weighing on you.
persianTranslation: از شر یک مشکل/بار خلاص شدن
دغدغه‌ای را از دوش خود برداشتن
examples: Finishing the project got the monkey off his back.
For many people, quitting smoking helps get the monkey off their back.
She felt relief after paying off the debt and getting the monkey off her back.
